name: Framework app - accessibility assertions stay green
Framework app (BDD) — Playground interactions work across platforms

scenarioSteps.text: I should see the element "playground-title" within 10000ms
I should not see the element "playground-details-text"
I type "Hello BDD test" into the "playground-input" field
the element "playground-input-mirror" should have text "Hello BDD test"
I scroll until I see the element "playground-details-text"
I scroll until I see the element "playground-sentinel"
I should see the element "playground-sentinel" within 10000ms
I scroll until I see the element "playground-sentinel-text"
the element "playground-sentinel-text" should have text "Bottom Reached"

name: Framework app - home screen renders on every platform
Framework app - modal navigation through UI
Framework app - relative selectors disambiguate targets
Framework app - capture screenshots for direct route jumps
Framework app - navigate to tabs explore through the UI

steps.command: expect.toHaveText("Browse more of the Spana demo experience")
